rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces school district tax bases, indirectly affecting the board's duty to adopt tax rates under Subsection (b)(8) and authority to levy M&O taxes under (c)(2). No direct statutory conflict, but fiscal-impact adjustments to rate-setting are required.
quote: (8) adopt a tax rate each fiscal year as required under Section 26.05, Tax Code;
_note: Educ. Code §11.1511 governs board powers/duties generally; it does not set exemption amounts. Impact is indirect via reduced taxable values affecting rate-setting and revenue projections.
